videos.title: How One of NYC’s Best Chefs Cooks Perfect Salmon in 10 Minutes | Made in House | Bon Appétit
videos.author: Bon Appétit
videos.description: Learn how to make perfectly crispy-skinned pan-seared salmon at home with chef Ed Szymanski in the Bon Appétit Test Kitchen. Learn how to choose the freshest salmon and master getting ultra-crispy skin without overcooking your fish. Served with a rich lemon caper brown butter sauce and Dijon spinach

videos.title: We Tried Singapore’s Legendary Chili Crab | Street Eats | Bon Appétit
videos.author: Bon Appétit
videos.description:
Bon Appétit meets Chef Lucas Sin at Singapore’s busiest seafood restaurant, KEK Seafood, to see how the city's iconic chili crab is made. Fresh Sri Lankan mud crab is transformed into a sweet, tangy dish served to hundreds of diners every night.

videos.title: The Garlic Technique Every Home Cook Should Know
videos.author: Bon Appétit
videos.description:
Confit garlic is one of the easiest ways to add huge flavor to your cooking. Cook garlic slowly in oil until soft, mix it into butter, and save the garlic oil for steaks, vegetables, vinaigrettes, and more.

#GarlicConfit #CookingTips #BonAppetit #Garlic #KitchenHacks #ChefTips

videos.title: The Truth About Being a Chef Nobody Talks About
videos.author: Bon Appétit
videos.description:
Chef Michael Vignola of The Eighty Six shares an honest look at the reality of being a chef. From the sacrifices of nights, weekends, and holidays to balancing family life and the demands of restaurant culture.
